statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.project_dir // empty'); f="${dir:-/home/jposluns/grc_library}/.working/next-prs.txt"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then total=$(grep -c '^[0-9]' "$f"); line=$(sed -n '1p' "$f"); num=$(echo "$line" | sed -E 's/^([0-9]+)\..*/\1/'); label=$(echo "$line" | sed -E 's/^[0-9]+\. //; s/ \(.*$//'); extra=$((total-1)); if [ "$extra" -gt 0 ]; then printf 'next: %s) %s  (+%d queued)' "$num" "$label" "$extra"; else printf 'next: %s) %s' "$num" "$label"; fi; else printf 'next: (queue file missing)'; fi
